abilities: I'll have you in top condition.
I'll make sure that doesn't scar.
Let me see what I can do.
Not to worry, I'll patch you up.
This will just take a moment.
How are you still moving?! (ally on critical health)
I'm covering you! (ally on critical health)
What happened to you? (ally on critical health)
You don't look good at all! (ally on critical health)
You need urgent care! (ally on critical health)
You really need treatment! (ally on critical health)
You're looking a bit under the weather. (ally on critical health)
Your backup is here! (ally on critical health)
Nano heals! *chuckles* There's really no difference. (healing while Nano-Boosted )
Not even you deserve death. (to Talon member or Ramattra )
You've survived too much to die now! (to Ana , Reinhardt or Torbjörn )
You're looking a bit under the weather. (to Mei )
Now this is ethical healing. (to Moira )
See, Doctor? No side effects. (to Moira )
Thank my medical professionalism , doctor. (to Moira )
For the record, I don't approve of your message. (to Moira )
*sigh* Reinhardt, where would you be without me? (to Reinhardt )
You are much too old for this. (to Reinhardt or Torbjörn )
You have to stay alive for this to work, Jack! (to Soldier: 76 )
Thank goodness for your armor. (ally with armor on critical health)
Careful--they can see you! (during Widowmaker 's Infra-Sight)
Go ahead. Cause more damage. (to Moira )
Do you even need more power? (to Zarya )
I still have use for you.
I will not let you fall!
Let's get you back in the fight.
There is much for you to do!
On your feet, Soldier! (resurrecting Soldier: 76 , rare)
chatter: Don't worry, I'll be right behind you.
Does everyone know the plan?
Helping those in need is its own reward.
I've learned a lot from my experiences.
No unnecessary risks!
Stay close. I can't heal you if you stray.
Take care of each other out there.
We must be very careful not to harm any civilians. Do not just assume I can heal them. Although I could, of course.
Everyone on this team can heal themselves. This should be easy! (when all teammates have self-healing abilities: Mei , Reaper , Roadhog , Soldier: 76 , and any Support heroes)
Looks like I'm going to be in the air, so call if you need me on the ground. (with Pharah or Echo on the team)
I know she's still in there. If I could just run some tests. (with Widowmaker on the team)
It's even more important to stretch before missions as you age. (with all older heroes on team)
Be careful out there!
Don't be too reckless out there!
Let's keep each other safe.
Stay aware of your needs.
The situation is proceeding quite well.
This is our opportunity. Let's not let it go to waste.
We have a great chance of success. Let's keep it up.
We've made the first step, now let's go for victory!
Don't lose hope! Not all is lost.
Don't lose sight of our goals. We can do this!
It is not over yet. We can turn this around.
The fight has only just begun.
If we succeed here, we will be victorious!
Let's keep our minds clear. We can do this!
This is our final chance. We can do this!
Victory does not come easily, but now we have a chance.
Healthy body, healthy mind.
I'd better be more careful.
I must go where I am needed.
I must return to my post.
Making a full recovery.
Medical technology is truly extraordinary!
My skills are still needed.
Now, where am I needed?
The wonders of modern medicine.
Full redeployment will take a little longer.
My patients are still recuperating.
Reinforcements are on the way.
Much better.
Self medicating.
That's better.
I am fully focused!
I'm at the height of my performance!
I'm on fire!
My duty is being done!
Execellent!
Oh, good!
This should be benefical.
Just what I'd hoped for.
My prognosis is excellent.
Ahhh...
Oh, you are good.
Thanks for looking out for me.
Ah, so that's how it feels!
I feel... powerful!
Thank you!
Damn!
Not good.
Now this is a role reversal.
So that's what it feels like!
We could all use a helping hand sometime!
Resurrecting each other? That's my specialty!
The enemy is being resurrected!
The enemy is being revived!
call-outs: Hang in there, our work is almost done!
Stand strong! We can do this!
We just need to hold out a little longer!
We're running out of time. Move quickly!
eliminations: Anyone know first aid?
Flatlined.
I should have a word with your medic.
If only I'd been on your side!
If only you'd had more support.
It had to be done.
Lie down.
Now this is brain surgery! (critical final blow)
Regrettable... but necessary.
That's one cure for foolishness.
Vital signs negative.
Were you expecting a remedy?
You didn't think that through, did you?
*sigh* I regret that it came to this, Freja. (eliminating Freja )
*sigh* Settle down. (eliminating Hazard )
You should be more careful, Juno. (eliminating Juno )
I am not fixing that one, Reinhardt. (eliminating Reinhardt )
Valkyrie justice! (using Valkyrie)
Oh! I won a dogfight! (mid-air elimination against an airborne enemy)
You are not safe just because you are very far away. (long-range elimination)
You deserved that, Genji. (eliminating Genji using Dragonblade)
Auf Wiedersehen, Doppelgänger! (eliminating another Mercy using Valkyrie)
Is this what it feels like to be Fareeha?! (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
Sorry, Fareeha. I couldn't resist. (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
I told you charging in would get you killed! (eliminating Reinhardt using Charge)
I'm speedy too, Lena! (eliminating Tracer using Blink)
No escape this time, Lacroix! (eliminating Widowmaker using Grappling Hook)
Calm down, Winston. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Splash! (getting an elimination while nanoboosted)
All in a day's work.
An incredible show of power!
Aren't you glad you have me?
Damage boost working as envisioned.
Don't forget the angel on your shoulder.
Glad I could help.
Good work.
I expected no less.
I make a powerful ally!
It's good to work with capable allies.
Look what we've achieved!
Our combined strength is quite impressive.
That's teamwork!
You haven't lost your touch. (assisting Ana , Baptiste or Soldier: 76 )
If only your father had seen that! (assisting Brigitte )
Teamwork from above! (assisting Echo or Pharah in mid-air)
You owe me for that one, Genji! (assisting Genji )
You're even sharper when we work together. (assisting Genji )
A job well done, Mei! (assisting Mei )
It's a pleasure to collaborate, Dr. Zhou! (assisting Mei )
Don't think I'm happy about this, Doctor. (assisting Moira )
This is not an endorsement of your methods. (assisting Moira )
Clearly, the sky is not the limit! (assisting Pharah )
Swish! That's what you say, right? Swish! (assisting Pharah )
We are a formidable duo! (assisting Pharah )
*laughs* We do get on well, don't we! (assisting Pharah )
I see you're reaping the benefits. (assisting Reaper )
You still have quite a swing, I see! (assisting Reinhardt )
Phenomenal! (assisting ally using ultimate ability)
*winces* Oh, dear... (assisting ally using quick melee)
Wow! You really pack a punch. (assisting Doomfist or Winston using quick melee)
I'm full of surprises.
I'm quite well-rounded.
I've always been an overachiever.
Proof of my full potential.
This does not look good for you.
*laughter* I never thought this would happen!
Ahem. I'm afraid you left me no choice.
*laughter* That, I did not expect!
Great work. They'll need to recover from that!
Well done, everyone. We put up a good fight!
Laying this argument to rest.
Let's lay this disagreement to rest.
Hah! One can't always be the bigger person.
Turn the other cheek.
Don't thank me. Just doing my job.
Help comes in many forms!
I'm always watching over you.
Get back!
Ha! I could've examined you from back there.
My reflexes are medically optimal.
Say "ahh!"
Taking a closer look.
You might not want to tell your friends about that.
And... goodbye!
Farewell!
Oh! You can't fly?
Where are your wings?
Enemy turret neutralized.
Ally Eliminates Enemy
Great job!
I'd hate to be the doctor who has to fix that.
Nice shot.
Well done. That's quite a feat!
You really gave it to them.
If you must misuse my technology, I'm glad you're good at it. (to Ana )
You're doing quite well, Fareeha. (to Pharah )
interactions: Mercy : I'm quite surprised that you can get back up without my help. Anran : Hey, one less person for you to keep an eye on, right? Mercy : I wouldn't go that far.
Mercy : Must you be so relaxed? We depend on you! Baptiste : I'm not relaxed, I just make everything look easy.

Baptiste : Angela, I met someone the other day who I think is just your type. Handsome, kind, several doctorates. Mercy : * laughs * I'm afraid there's someone else I have my eye on. Baptiste : Oh? Anyone I know? Mercy : Well, with any luck, you'll find out soon enough.
Brigitte : Angela! It's so strange to see you in your armor! Mercy : I could say the same for you!
Mercy : Brigitte, did you finish the last slice of pie? I was saving it for later. Brigitte : It wasn't me this time!

Mercy : You've been doing a lot around Gibraltar , lately. Are you taking care of yourself? D.Va : I'm fine! I put in hours like this all the time back in Korea ! Mercy : * sigh * That's exactly what I'm worried about.
Mercy : You are on the wrong path, Freja. Freja : If you say so, Doctor. Mercy : You used to help people! What you're doing now, it's... Freja : It’s enough for me. That’s all there is to it
Mercy : Freja... You should know you are not the only one who looks back on Overwatch with regret. Freja : If I can help it, I don't look back at all.

Mercy : Now that Overwatch is back, I insist that you start dressing up for the Halloween parties. Genji : What? I always dress up. Mercy : You can't be 'cyborg ninja' every year. Genji : How about... 'cyborg ninja in a hat'?

Mercy : So... why did we really stop writing? I know my sketch wasn't that terrible. Genji : Conflict got in the way. It is as you say, "war takes every happiness." Mercy : An unfortunate truth. But... we're still friends, aren't we? Genji : Nothing could ever take that from us.

Genji : Angela, have you tried the coffee here? Mercy : Not yet, unfortunately. Genji : It tastes a bit like yours. Although, it's 'dark roast', not 'charred'. Mercy : For your information, I like my coffee burnt.

Genji : It is strange to be here again. Mercy : It's... different. Certainly not the Gibraltar I remember. Genji : If you are missing old times, I could try almost dying again. Mercy : *laugh* You make my job hard enough when you're not trying.
Hazard : Alright, doc... diagnose me. I dare ye! Mercy : *sigh* Whatever your issue is, it seems quite clear I can't treat it. Hazard : What makes you think I'm lookin' for a cure?

Mercy : Given the injuries you've sustained... you must be in an immense amount of pain. Hazard : Let me guess: you want to poke and prod, make it all go away? Mercy : Well, an examination certainly couldn't hurt. Hazard : Examine all you like. It won't mend the harm you've done.

Junkrat : Doc, I've got this rash that won't go away. I've tried everything: radiation, dirt, radioactive dirt... Mercy : Have you tried bandaging your mouth? Junkrat : Would that help? Mercy : *sigh* It'd help me.

Mercy : Hm... Juno, you seem quite... attached to your suit. Juno : It keeps my vitals stable. Removing it could be catastrophic. Mercy : You should be fine now that you've acclimated to Earth. Juno : I will keep it on. Just in case I explode.
Kiriko : Does anyone have a bandage? Mercy : I should have a few. Kiriko : Finally! I'm glad someone came prepared.
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Mercy : Eichhörnchen. That's German for squirrel. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Lúcio : Mercy, are you ready to dance and groove? Mercy : I never stop!

Mercy : Biolight has such potential for medicine and agriculture! Lifeweaver : Sadly, Vishkar agrees. They want their hands on it, and they're willing to cut mine off to get it. Mercy : * sighing * Sounds about right.
Mercy : Someone your size should donate blood more frequently than the average person. Mauga : You need more? I can get you more.
Mercy : I keep forgetting to calibrate my staff to your higher temperature. Mauga : Thanks for reminding me that I'm hot stuff. Mercy : More like the stuff of medical nightmares...
Mauga : Angela! *chuckle* I can call you Angela, right? Mercy : For you? Doctor Ziegler. Mauga : Aw... I'm a little hurt... "Doctor".
Mauga : Why the look, doc? Did I do something? Mercy : Besides weaponizing illegal medical enhancements? Mauga : What, that's all? Whew! Thought you found out about some other things...
Mercy : I'd rather wait a century for progress than cause the harm you have. Moira : What a joy it must be, to feel entitled to patience.
Mercy : How are you funding your crimes against humanity these days? Moira : My old friends, "innovation" and "imagination". A shame you've never met them.
Moira : How fares your research, Dr. Ziegler? Making much progress through all that "red tape"? Mercy : It's called the Hippocratic Oath, doctor. Ring any bells?
Pharah : If you ever need help, just fly to me, Angela. Mercy : *laughs* Ah, my hero! You're like a knight in flying armor! Pharah : That's what I'm going for.
Ramattra : It must gall you, working with me. Keeping me alive. Mercy : I don't want anyone to die. Not even you.
Mercy : What happened to you? Reaper : You tell me, doc.
Mercy : I'm not giving up on you, Reyes. Reaper : I wish you would.
Mercy : *sigh* Reinhardt, answering the Recall is not my idea of "hanging it up." Reinhardt : I had to show! Otherwise, your life would be far too easy! Mercy : And what a shame that would be.
Mercy : Are you sure that gas you inhale is safe? Roadhog : It tastes good.

Sigma : Doctor, are we still meeting for lunch after the seminar today? Mercy : Siebren, that was years and years ago. But we had a lovely talk. Sigma : Oh, I remember now. Birds, wasn't it? Birds and music.
Mercy : Vivian! What have you been up to? Sojourn : Oh, you know. Surviving. Mercy : And how's Murphy? Sojourn : Doing much better, now that you aren't feeding her scraps all the time.
Mercy : So... how is that man you were telling me about? Sojourn : Angela, I'm not discussing my love life on a mission.
Mercy : Your hair looks brittle, Jack. Are you taking your vitamins? Soldier: 76 : Once a day, just after my steak dinner.

Torbjörn : Are you ever going to tell me Valkyrie 's airfoil ratio? Mercy : Are you going to tell me Ingrid 's apple pie recipe? Torbjörn : Hmph, you drive a hard bargain. Mercy : I'll just ask her myself.
Mercy : You know, anger management classes might help you with that temper. Torbjörn : Doctors! Always wanting you to do the work.

Tracer : What's the most crazy thing you've seen as a doctor? Mercy : Well, there was one pilot who was lost in time. Tracer : Aaaah, right... *laughs* That was an adventure! Sorry about that! Mercy : Don't be. You were worth it.
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Mercy : Na! Winston : * chuckles *
Mercy : Call to me if you need help. I won't let you fall. Winston : Dr. Ziegler, don't forget. We're here to support you too . Mercy : Thank you Winston I... needed to hear that.

Wuyang : Dr. Ziegler, you should join use next time we run drills! I feel like I only ever see you in the lab. Mercy : I'm better at working than training. Why not ask Commander Chase ? Wuyang : Well... I was hoping to pick up some of your tricks with the staff. Mercy : If you promise to be patient with me, I'll do my best.
Mercy : I refuse to believe that your healing is magical! Zenyatta : What seems like magic is sometimes science we don't yet understand. Mercy : Exactly! I must learn how it works!
map-specific: Did you see that Fareeha? (in a team with Pharah)
New York, New York. A summer smell you'll never forget!
If we can make it here, we can make it anywhere!
